---
title: Ourson qui dort
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557557/oursondort_20240409_qiannn.png
description: Ourson qui dort
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2024-04-09
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557557/oursondort_20240409_qiannn.png)
